title: Service Pupils in Schools: Non-statutory guidance
body: "This non-statutory guidance from the Ministry of Defence and Department for Education helps state-funded schools and local authorities in England to understand and address the educational and wellbeing needs of Service pupils in schools (reception to year 11).    This guidance is for:   school leaders, school staff, trust leaders, trust boards and governing bodies in all maintained schools, academies, and non-maintained special schools in England local authorities in England  "

taxons.title: Support services for military and defence personnel and their families
